sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14376" key="a)po/yuxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-ψῡχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frigid,</tr_> of literary style, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
